race.description: 2026 Pryde's Easifeed Trotting Free For All (G3)
race.comment: I AM HELLBOUND (3) had to work last week so he'll enjoy a lower draw and was good when fourth from the back row in the Great Square prior. Went into that having won five of his previous six starts and gets his chance to return to winning form. CRACKERJACK NZ (10) continues a run of tough barriers but he has been very good since crossing the Tasman, kicking off with a Melton win before placing in his two outings here since. Has beaten I AM HELLBOUND in both of those and could do it again with even luck. DASH DOSH NZ (11) may need some luck from the back row but she is a real player off her second in the Great Square two back. Manners let LONDON TO A BRICK (5) down last week but he returns to the front row and has the talent to win if he gets it right.
